parameters.prompt: One photorealistic spacecraft pilot seat for a suited adult, 0.74 m wide, 1.35 m high, 0.92 m deep. Rigid shock-isolated base, articulated back shell, headrest, segmented pressure cushions, five-point restraint anchors, folding arm supports, visible adjustment rails and rear service access. Human ergonomic proportions and believable construction, neutral upright pose, isolated single object, forward faces +Z. No person, cockpit, controls, screens, text, logo, stand, ground, or background.
parameters.texture_prompt: De-lit realistic cockpit seat: dark woven pressure fabric, charcoal composite shell, brushed titanium frame and rails, restrained amber release hardware, localized hand-contact wear, no baked lighting, pseudo-text, logos, broad grime, or emissive glow.

strengths: single connected upright seat with coherent base, cushions, back, headrest and side supports
raw proportions map cleanly to the authored 0.74 x 1.35 x 0.92 m envelope
required_cleanup: separate restraint, arm support and adjustment parts around authored pivots
verify suited occupant, eye point, ingress and emergency release clearance
